sections.paragraph:
patron. n. [Ezrahite], a descendant of Ezrach (אֶזְרָח); used of Ethan, 1Ki 5:11 Psa 89:1 and of Heman, Psa 88:1. Both of these are said, 1Ch 2:6, to be the descendants of Zarah (זֶרַת) the son of Judah; and thus אֶזְרָח is to be taken only as another form of the same name, used only in its patronymic. As to the family of these men, see my arguments against Bertholdt (Einleit. p. 1974); Allg. Lit. Zeit. Ergänzungsbl. 1816, p. 646.

I.
